meanings.usage: 指为了不让人认出而做的装扮
指装扮成别人以隐藏身份
为防止危险或问题发生而采取的措施
指认出一个之前见过的人或事物
有树荫遮挡阳光的地方
在户外搭帐篷住宿的活动
表示轻蔑或嘲讽的表情或声音

examples.en: The bus stopped and the actors got off.
examples.zh: 公交车停下，演员们下了车。

examples.en: She got off the train at the next station.
examples.zh: 她在下一站下了火车。

examples.en: Take an umbrella in case it rains.
examples.zh: 带把伞以防下雨。

examples.en: It says 'No Camping' in case you can't read!
examples.zh: 上面写着'禁止露营'——以防你不会读！

examples.en: Now you get out of here, all of you!
examples.zh: 现在你们都给我滚出去！

examples.en: Get out of here! I don't want to see you.
examples.zh: 滚出去！我不想见到你。

phrases.usage: 对某人苛刻；对某人严厉

examples.en: Don't be too hard on us, sheriff.
examples.zh: sheriff，别对我们太苛刻了。

examples.en: The teacher is too hard on the new students.
examples.zh: 老师对新学生太苛刻了。

examples.en: When they had all made themselves comfortable, a stranger appeared.
examples.zh: 当他们都安顿好之后，一个陌生人出现了。

examples.en: Please make yourselves comfortable.
examples.zh: 请随便坐，不要拘束。

examples.en: They had taken special precautions so that no one should recognize them.
examples.zh: 他们采取了特别的预防措施以免被人认出来。

examples.en: We should take precautions against fire.
examples.zh: 我们应该采取防火措施。

examples.en: Dressed in dark glasses and old clothes, they tried to hide.
examples.zh: 他们戴着墨镜，穿着旧衣服，试图隐藏自己。

examples.en: The children were dressed in red.
examples.zh: 孩子们穿着红色的衣服。

examples.en: It couldn't be better, Gloria.
examples.zh: 再好不过了，Gloria。

examples.en: The weather couldn't be better for a picnic.
examples.zh: 这个天气野餐再合适不过了。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述过去正在进行的动作，常与when/while等连词连用

examples.en: An ancient bus stopped by a dry river bed.
examples.zh: 一辆古旧的公交车停在干涸的河床边。

examples.en: Two other actors had carried two large food baskets to a shady spot.
examples.zh: 另外两位演员把两个大食物篮子搬到了树荫下。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻之前已经完成的动作
grammar.usage: 用于描述两个过去的动作，先发生的动作用过去完成时，后发生的动作用一般过去时

examples.en: When they had all made themselves comfortable, a stranger appeared.
examples.zh: 当他们都安顿好之后，一个陌生人出现了。

examples.en: He had finished his work before he left.
examples.zh: 他离开之前已经完成了工作。

grammar.title: 直接引语 (Direct Speech)
grammar.definition: 直接引用别人的话，使用引号
grammar.usage: 在叙述对话时直接引用人物的原话

examples.en: 'This is a wonderful place for a picnic,' said Gloria Gleam.
examples.zh: '这是野餐的好地方，'Gloria Gleam说。

examples.en: 'Now you get out of here!' he shouted.
examples.zh: '现在你们给我滚出去！'他喊道。

sentencePatterns.pattern: This is a wonderful place for...

original.en: This is a wonderful place for a picnic.

imitations.en: This is a wonderful place for a holiday.
This is a wonderful place for a party.
The weather couldn't be better today.
imitations.zh: 今天天气好得不能再好了。

original.en: I'm Brinksley Meers, and my other name is Gloria Gleam.
original.zh: 我是Brinksley Meers，我的另一个名字是Gloria Gleam。

imitations.en: I'm Tom, and my other name is Thomas.
imitations.zh: 我叫Tom，我的另一个名字是Thomas。

imitations.en: She's Lucy, and her other name is Lucia.
imitations.zh: 她叫Lucy，她的另一个名字是Lucia。

original.en: Don't be too hard on us.

imitations.en: Don't be too hard on him. He's just a child.
imitations.zh: 别对他太苛刻了，他只是个孩子。

imitations.en: Don't be too hard on yourself. You did your best.
imitations.zh: 别对自己太苛刻了，你已经尽力了。
